name: ProGrow NPK 20-20-20 water-soluble (2 lb)
description: All-purpose crystalline feed for vegetables and herbs. Mix per label for foliar or soil drench during establishment, flowering, and fruiting.

name: Atlantic kelp & fish emulsion 32 fl oz
description: Cold-processed liquid with trace minerals and gentle nitrogen for transplants, leafy crops, and recovery after stress.

name: Garden gypsum (calcium sulfate) 25 lb
description: Improves soil structure in heavy clay and supplies calcium without shifting pH—useful where blossom-end rot is a recurring issue.

name: Compost + mycorrhizae inoculant blend (1 cu ft)
description: Aged compost fortified with endo mycorrhizae to support root uptake. Incorporate at planting for tomatoes, peppers, and cucurbits.

name: Copper soap fungicide, ready-to-use 24 fl oz
description: Low-rate copper for early blight, Septoria, and bacterial spot on tomatoes and other solanums. Spray to runoff; avoid peak sun.

name: Cold-pressed neem oil concentrate 16 fl oz
description: 70% clarified hydrophobic neem extract for aphids, whiteflies, and mites. Emulsify per label; test on a leaf before full application.

name: Bt kurstaki liquid 8 fl oz
description: Biological larvicide for caterpillars on brassicas, tomatoes, and corn. OMRI-listed formulation; reapply after heavy rain.

name: Wettable sulfur fungicide 1 lb
description: For powdery mildew on cucurbits and some rusts. Do not combine with oils in the same season; check temperature limits on label.

name: Cherry tomato ‘Sun Sugar’ F1 (25 seeds)
description: High-Brix yellow cherry with strong field tolerance to common tomato mosaic strains. Indeterminate; stake or trellis.

name: Sweet Italian ‘Carmen’ pepper (30 seeds)
description: Horn-shaped red sweets for grilling and salads. Open-pollinated; start indoors 8 weeks before last frost.

name: Cut-and-come-again lettuce mix (500 seeds)
description: Blend of oakleaf, romaine, and red looseleaf for continuous harvest. Sow every 2 weeks in cool weather.

name: ‘Provider’ bush bean (2 oz)
description: Early green pod bean with good cold soil emergence. Direct-sow after soil reaches 60°F (16°C).

name: ‘Marketmore 76’ slicing cucumber (40 seeds)
description: Dependable slicer with resistance to several cucumber mosaic strains. Trellis for straight fruit.

name: ‘French Breakfast’ radish (300 seeds)
description: Mild, crisp roots in about 25 days—ideal between slower crops. Keep soil evenly moist for best texture.

name: Vitron 2 L pump sprayer with brass wand
description: Adjustable cone to fan pattern; Viton seals for oil-based products. Rinse thoroughly between products.

name: Forged bypass pruners, 8 in
description: SK5 steel blade, sap groove, and rubber bumpers for daily deadheading and sucker removal on tomatoes.

name: 3-in-1 analog soil meter (moisture / pH / light)
description: Probe-style tester for containers and raised beds—use as a trend guide and calibrate pH with a lab test annually.

name: Nitrile-dipped grip gloves (3 pair, M/L)
description: Breathable knit back with sandy nitrile palm for wet foliage, pruning, and rinsing harvest bins.
